user.title: Symetrix appliance
user.description: Address of the Symetrix appliance on the network. If it is not reachable yet, check "Skip connection test" — the controls will stay unavailable until the appliance answers.

data.skip_test: Skip connection test (appliance not reachable yet)

musiselect.title: MusiSelect device
musiselect.description: Address of the MusiSelect music source. Leave the host empty if there is none.

channels.title: Add a channel
channels.description: Channels added so far: {count}. Give the controller number, a name, and the exact volume this channel must play at each level. Leave the number and name empty and uncheck "Add another" to finish.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance
error.duplicate_channel: This controller number is already configured
error.channel_incomplete: Give both a controller number and a name (or leave both empty to finish)

connection.title: Appliance connections
connection.description: Addresses of the Symetrix appliance and the MusiSelect music source (leave the MusiSelect host empty if there is none). If the Symetrix is not reachable yet, check "Skip connection test" — the controls will stay unavailable until it answers.

data.skip_test: Skip connection test (appliance not reachable yet)

add_channel.title: Add a channel
add_channel.description: Give the controller number, a name, and the exact volume this channel must play at each level. The values are what guests hear - nothing is computed between them. The highest level also caps the channel's volume slider, so the speakers cannot be over-driven.

edit_channel_form.title: Edit a channel
edit_channel_form.description: The exact volume {name} plays at each level. The values are what guests hear - nothing is computed between them. The highest level also caps this channel's volume slider.

levels.title: Volume levels
levels.description: The percentage levels to offer, separated by commas (e.g. 0, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100). Each level becomes a toggle.

add_event.title: Add an event button
add_event.description: Turning the event on loads the Symetrix preset and sends the MusiSelect command. After the duration (e.g. the song length), the return preset switches back to the normal source. Blocked while a pause is active.

data_description.command: Leave empty to send the MusiSelect program selected for the whole installation (the birthday song language)
data_description.preset: Leave empty if this event offers a choice of zones

edit_event_form.title: Settings
edit_event_form.description: Turning the event on loads the Symetrix preset and sends the MusiSelect command. After the duration (e.g. the song length), the return preset switches back to the normal source. Blocked while a pause is active.

data_description.command: Leave empty to send the MusiSelect program selected for the whole installation (the birthday song language)
data_description.preset: Leave empty if this event offers a choice of zones

add_cgroup.title: Add a channel group
add_cgroup.description: A channel group gets one volume slider that drives every channel in it - each through its own calibration.

edit_cgroup_form.title: Edit a channel group
edit_cgroup_form.description: A channel group gets one volume slider that drives every channel in it - each through its own calibration.

menu_options.export: Export the configuration to a file
menu_options.import: Import a configuration from a file

export.title: Export the configuration
export.description: Writes the channels and their volumes, the levels, the groups and the events to a file you can download from your browser. The appliance addresses are not included, so the file can be reused as a template for another restaurant.

import.title: Import a configuration
import.description: Upload a file exported from Kydax Sound. The channels, levels, groups and events are replaced; the appliance addresses are left untouched.

event_menu.title: {name}
event_menu.description: What do you want to change on {name}?

event_zones.title: Zones of {name}
event_zones.description: Each entry becomes an option in a selector: pick one before running the event and that preset is loaded. Leave empty to always load the event's own preset.

languages.title: MusiSelect programs
languages.description: The programs the MusiSelect can play, for example the birthday song in each language. One selector applies to the whole installation: the program chosen there is what events send, unless an event has a command of its own.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance
error.duplicate_channel: This controller number is already configured
error.invalid_levels: Invalid levels: whole percentages between 0 and 100, separated by commas
error.invalid_file: The file is not a valid Kydax Sound export
error.invalid_channels: The file contains channels without a number, a name or their volumes
error.write_failed: Could not write the file - check the name and permissions

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the appliance to run the test

set_level.name: Set volume level
set_level.description: Sets every channel to its calibrated volume for a percentage. Any percentage from 0 to 100 works, not just the configured level toggles. Paused channels are skipped.

level.name: Level
level.description: Percentage of the volume range (0 = off).

trigger_event.name: Trigger an event
trigger_event.description: Starts a configured event by name (e.g. the birthday song): loads the Symetrix preset, sends the MusiSelect command, then after the duration loads the return preset. Blocked while a pause is active.

name.name: Event name
name.description: The name of the event button as configured in the options.

cancel_event.name: Cancel an event
cancel_event.description: Stops a running event early and loads its return preset, if one is configured.

name.name: Event name
name.description: The name of the event button as configured in the options.

set_channel_level.name: Set the level of specific channels
set_channel_level.description: Sets only the given channels to a percentage, each through its own calibration. Paused channels are skipped.

level.name: Level
level.description: Percentage of the volume range (0 = off).

set_channel_db.name: Set channels to a dB value
set_channel_db.description: Sets the given channels to an explicit dB, clamped to each channel's highest configured level so speakers cannot be over-driven.

db.name: Volume
db.description: The dB value to play, e.g. -30.
